metadata.description: Skills for working with the Hadron AI-memory platform via the hadron CLI

plugins.name: hadron-cli
plugins.description: Work with Hadron AI-memory (memories, nodes, edges, Apps) from the shell via the hadron CLI

plugins.name: hadron
plugins.description: Hadron slash commands — /hadron:h-task (run a task), /hadron:h-search (search the graph), /hadron:h-open-node (open a node in the portal)
